attractions.name: Do Drul Chorten (Stupa)
attractions.description: A peaceful white-domed stupa surrounded by prayer wheels and fluttering prayer flags. The ambience here is deeply spiritual and extremely calming, perfect for a gentle pause in the day
source_files: Northeast India/Mahendra_All Inclusive Guide_Sikkim+WB.pdf

attractions.name: Gangtok Ropeway Cable Car
attractions.description: A gentle aerial ride offering spectacular bird's-eye views of Gangtok town, valleys, monasteries, and rivers below
source_files: Northeast India/Mahendra_All Inclusive Guide_Sikkim+WB.pdf

attractions.name: Kyongnosla Waterfall
attractions.description: A beautifully cascading Himalayan waterfall set amidst rhododendron forests along the Tsomgo Lake route
source_files: Northeast India/Mahendra_All Inclusive Guide_Sikkim+WB.pdf

local_dishes.name: Thukpa
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Momos
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Sel Roti
local_dishes.description: Traditional homemade, ring-shaped rice doughnut that's sweet and commonly served during festivals
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Chang
local_dishes.description: Locally made alcoholic beverage made from millet, rice, barley, or buckwheat with 15-20% alcohol content
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Shah-Paley
local_dishes.description: Sikkim-style meat patty made from minced meat, spices, and herbs, deep-fried until golden and crispy
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Churrpi
local_dishes.description: Soup made of cottage cheese, traditional street food
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Thentuk
local_dishes.description: Tibetan soup made with chicken, meat, wheat or vegetables
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Masauyra Curry
local_dishes.description: Popular local dish made with fermented black gram, served with rice or bread
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Shimi Ko Achar
local_dishes.description: Pickle made from string beans with sesame seeds, green chilies and lemon juice
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Sishnu Soup
local_dishes.description: Typical Himalayan cuisine with boiled nettle leaves and garlic flakes
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Chambray
local_dishes.description: Dish originating from Nepal, similar to vegetable biryani, served with rice as Pulao
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kinema
local_dishes.description: Fermented soybean product used as meat substitute, cooked into soup or used as dip
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kodo Ko Roti
local_dishes.description: Millet bread pancake, black in color with soft texture, served with finger tomato pickle
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Laphing
local_dishes.description: Spicy, cold mung bean noodle dish with soy sauce
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Aloo Dum
local_dishes.description: Spicy potato curry that is a staple of Nepali cuisine
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kakra Ko Achar
local_dishes.description: Cucumber salad or pickle made with julienne cucumbers, sesame seeds, garlic, green chili
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf

local_dishes.name: Traditional Nepali Thali
local_dishes.description: Complete meal with Dal, Bhaat, Tarkaari, Chutney or Achaar and sweet dish
source_files: Northeast India/All Inclusive Guide- Sikkim and Darjeeling.pdf
